title: Venue in derivative proceeding
doc_html:
§1-742.3. Venue in derivative proceeding

            A derivative proceeding shall be brought in the parish where the registered office of the corporation is located.

            Acts 2017, No. 57, §1.
doc_text:
§1-742.3.  Venue in derivative proceeding
A derivative proceeding shall be brought in the parish where the registered office of
the corporation is located.
Acts 2017, No. 57, §1.
